_comment: Single source of truth for upstream codec sources. Read by CMake (cmake/CodecVersions.cmake) and by tools/sync-codecs.py. snappy is the pure-C andikleen port (no C++ runtime); third_party/snappy/compat.h is a hand-authored portable shim, not upstream. google/snappy (C++) is snapshotted at third_party/snappy-oracle (from tag 1.2.2) as a TEST-ONLY differential oracle — it never ships, so it is intentionally not a codec entry here. NOTE: tools/vendor-codecs.py still has a google-snappy-specific special-case; update it (preserve compat.h, no config.h) before re-vendoring snappy.
